PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Owner\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Owner-Documents-Projects-drovik-fitness\\7beb2f84-5f31-4b59-bd5c-0df541ff5fbc.jsonl" -Tail 100 | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json } | Where-Object { $_.type -in @\('user', 'assistant'\) -and $_.message -ne $null } | Select-Object -Last 20; $content | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.type\)]: $\($_.message.content | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -is [string]\) { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $_.Length\)\) } else { $_.text | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $_.Length\)\) } } }\)" })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Owner\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Owner-Documents-Projects-drovik-fitness\\7beb2f84-5f31-4b59-bd5c-0df541ff5fbc.jsonl" -Tail 50; $lines | ForEach-Object { try { $obj = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.message.content\) { $text = $obj.message.content | Where-Object { $_ -is [string] -or $_.type -eq 'text' } | Select-Object -First 1; $preview = if \($text -is [string]\) { $text } else { $text.text }; if \($preview\) { Write-Host "[$\($obj.type\)]: $\($preview.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $preview.Length\)\)\)" } } } catch {} })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Owner\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Owner-Documents-Projects-drovik-fitness\\7beb2f84-5f31-4b59-bd5c-0df541ff5fbc.jsonl"; Write-Host "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; $lines | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Owner\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Owner-Documents-Projects-drovik-fitness\\7beb2f84-5f31-4b59-bd5c-0df541ff5fbc.jsonl"; $lines | Select-Object -Last 200 -First 150 | ForEach-Object { try { $obj = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($obj.message.role -in @\('user','assistant'\)\) { $content = $obj.message.content; $text = if \($content -is [string]\) { $content } elseif \($content -is [array]\) { $content | Where-Object { $_ -is [string] -or \($_ -is [psobject] -and $_.type -eq 'text'\) } | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -is [string]\) { $_ } else { $_.text } } | Select-Object -First 1 }; if \($text\) { Write-Host "[$\($obj.message.role.ToUpper\(\)\)]: $\($text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $text.Length\)\)\)" } } } catch {} })
